title: Example submission (local money-loop proof)
summary: Example: attaches local money-loop smoke + now-queue smoke outputs as evidence artifacts.

scenarios.scenario: Two concurrent finalization attempts for the same provider_payment_id
scenarios.expected_behavior: At most one financial effect (1 transaction + 1 application); duplicates are no-ops
scenarios.verification_method: Run the P0-02.C and P0-02.E race tests; confirm 1 tx + 1 app

scenarios.scenario: Same webhook event replayed multiple times
scenarios.expected_behavior: No duplicate transaction/application and no duplicate canonical event
scenarios.verification_method: Replay the same event in local tests; assert dedupe flags and 1 tx/app

scenarios.scenario: Legacy invoice has amount_paid > 0 but no ledger applications
scenarios.expected_behavior: System flags reconciliation_required; does not silently settle incorrectly
scenarios.verification_method: Run P0-02.E legacy capture/quarantine tests; confirm flags and proof objects

scenarios.scenario: RPC fails mid-run (no partial money writes)
scenarios.expected_behavior: No partial financial effect; alert/trace emitted; safe to retry
scenarios.verification_method: Simulate RPC failure in controlled test; assert no tx/app created
Run P0-02.B manual reference rejection tests

guarantees: No duplicate financial effect under reruns/overlap due to DB uniqueness/idempotency
non_guarantees: Does not guarantee zero duplicate processing attempts without explicit lock strategy

ops_impact.task_dedupe_rule: public.ensure_follow_up_task(tenant_id, source_type, source_id, title) prevents duplicates

uncertainty_boundaries: This example proves local path-level behavior only; it is not production proof.

findings.title: Local money loop smoke produced verifiable IDs and DB evidence
findings.business_impact: Provides evidence-grade artifact format for review gate validation.
findings.recommended_action: Replace this example with a real change submission that includes dedicated db_output/test_result files and exact code references.
findings.verification_method: Run `pwsh -NoProfile -File .\\scripts\\money-loop-smoke-test.ps1 -SkipStart` and confirm output contains IDs + DB queries.

positive_tests: public pay succeeds in local mock mode
now-queue smoke shows tasks + suspension + no job
verification.idempotency_analysis: Smoke test calls approval twice and public-pay twice; idempotent outcomes are asserted in the output log.
verification.replay_test: Re-run the same smoke scripts and confirm identical invariants hold (exactly-once job per quote, already_paid on second pay).
verification.exactly_once_analysis: Smoke test calls approval twice; DB evidence shows a single job for the quote_id.

readiness.reason: This is an example submission used to validate the review gate; not a production-ready remediation.
